change.behavior: For explicit detector current_location_relation ON/INSIDE, repeated label aliases are resolved to the closest same-frame observed object only when the nearest bbox surface distance is separated from the second nearest by more than the ambiguity margin. Near ties still raise SpatialQAError.
change.evidence_scope: same-frame SceneObservation objects only; no QA gold answer, oracle required edges, or evaluator-only fields are read.

expected_dsg_effect.memory_storage_content: support/container current-location edges survive when external detector uses common labels such as countertop, chair, or cabinet and one observed support is spatially clear
expected_dsg_effect.query_behavior: GraphTool sees explicit detector_current_location edges before support fallback and room fallback
expected_dsg_effect.risk_control: ambiguous same-label supports are not guessed; producer must return stable ids or better evidence for near ties

next_experiment.required_external_return: detector/RGB-D JSONL can provide either stable support ids or common support labels; common labels are acceptable only when same-frame geometry makes the nearest support unambiguous.
next_experiment.rerun_needed: Rebuild detector-only observation sequence and predicted DSG after external detector/RGB-D return, then compare P34/P35 DSG against VLM P26.

objective: increase DSG support/current-location memory retention after the VLM-only semantic gate has passed

problem.dsg_failure_mode: external detector/RGB-D current-location evidence may be dropped, causing GraphTool to fall back to IN_ROOM and lose support/container answers.
problem.previous_behavior: P33 accepted unique same-frame current_location_id label aliases but rejected all repeated support labels, even when one support was clearly nearest to the target.

verification.full_verify_result: all checks passed; 796 pytest cases passed; evaluation suite 52/52 passed
green_commands: python -m pytest -q tests/test_predicted_graph_builder.py tests/test_spatial_qa.py -k "current_location or support_fallback or support_like or predicted_graph"

green_result.mypy: Success: no issues found in 2 source files

verification.red_test: python -m pytest -q tests/test_predicted_graph_builder.py -k "current_location_label_alias or clear_nearest_support" failed before implementation on clear-nearest multi-label alias with Ambiguous current_location_id label alias
